categories.description: Fix files failing Prettier or import-sort/no-relative-import lint, and remove knip-reported unused exports, files, and deps. Mechanical, fully gate-provable; runs first.
Remove or refine low-value narrating comments and commented-out code; keep comments that explain a non-obvious why.
Reuse or extract shared helpers for duplicated logic. Always prefer adopting an existing helper over creating a new one.
Simplify verbose code, remove unsafe casts and dead defensive branches, and integrate better with the wider codebase.
Swap raw HTML for UI primitives (BlockStack/InlineStack/Text/Heading/Paragraph) and hardcoded color classes for the tone prop. Exact-mapping swaps only.
Flag React Compiler adoption gaps. Promotion of ready dirs is off by default; when enabled, only dirs annotated '0 useCallback/useMemo - ready to enable' are eligible.

Add missing unit/component tests, author e2e specs, and repair stale or skipped tests for recently-changed, under-covered code. A passing test can still assert the wrong behavior, so reviewers must confirm assertions reflect intent. Runs last.
